description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Cmder that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: build on windows-latest, upload artifacts which depends on build, and send a Gitter notification which depends on upload. The build job checks out the repository, sets up MSBuild, and runs PowerShell scripts to build and pack Cmder Launcher. The upload job uploads four artifacts. The notification job sends a Gitter notification using a webhook.
